title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
